description: Grade 1 Creative Activities learning areas for art, music, movement, and play.

learningAreas.title: Art and Craft
learningAreas.description: Draw, colour, model, and make simple patterns with safe materials.

learningAreas.title: Music
learningAreas.description: Sing simple songs, clap rhythms, and listen to sounds.

learningAreas.title: Movement
learningAreas.description: Move safely, balance, stretch, and play simple movement games.

learningAreas.title: Imaginative Play
learningAreas.description: Use role play, stories, and actions to express ideas.
